creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Comment on attachment 254191
0001-devel-ocaml-cmdliner-Update-to-1.3.0-chase-ABI-chang.patch

As far as I know, the new version is backward compatible the version in the tree. I'd really appreciate a quick reaction on this PR. Because I'd like to update and introduce other ports without having to continue to patch them to use the 1.0 API (as this is quite tedious, that time could be better spend on other areas).
Thanks!
